# Slides QA Snapshot (2026-04-25)

Scope: S0/S1/S2/S3/S3.2/S3.3 slide module surfaces after editor, audit explorer, and ownership-transfer increments.

## QA Commands Run

- `npm run typecheck` ✅ pass
- `npm run lint` ✅ pass
  - `check-tokens` clean
  - `check-stories` clean (`175` story files)
- `npm run build` ✅ pass
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/frontend-smoke.spec.ts -g "US-SLD-040" --workers=1` ✅ pass (`1/1`)
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts -g "SLD-FE-142" --workers=1` ✅ pass (`1/1`)
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/frontend-smoke.spec.ts --workers=1` ✅ pass (`29/29`)
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts --workers=1` ✅ pass (`24/24`)
  - Includes S2 editor interaction coverage (`US-SLD-021`..`US-SLD-025`), existing S1/S3 regression checks, browser-back unsaved guard coverage (`SLD-FE-142`), template visibility/ownership governance coverage (`SLD-FE-400`, `SLD-BE-400`), ownership/collaborator governance coverage (`SLD-FE-410`, `SLD-BE-410`), and activity filter/pagination/export coverage (`SLD-FE-420`, `SLD-BE-420`).
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/slides-visual.spec.ts --workers=1` ✅ pass (`3/3`)
  - Includes screenshot-diff baseline coverage for canvas default, multi-select, and style-toolbar-selected states.
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts tests/e2e/slides-visual.spec.ts --workers=1` ✅ pass (`27/27`)
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/frontend-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts tests/e2e/slides-visual.spec.ts --workers=1` ✅ pass (`56/56`)

## QA Notes

- Navigation setup now uses retry/backoff for transient `ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED` events in smoke/slides e2e specs.
- Templates API visibility constraints now apply before backend `limit`, preventing false-empty template results for non-admin users.
- Template publish workflow now supports explicit private/shared visibility controls with role-aware UI constraints (`SLD-FE-400`).
- Template ACL actions now enforce owner/admin visibility edits and archive operations with audit events (`SLD-BE-400`).
- Template governance now supports ownership handoff, collaborator role management (editor/reviewer/viewer), and destination-user authorization in backend (`SLD-FE-410`, `SLD-BE-410`).
- Activity feed now supports action/outcome/entity/date filters, server-side pagination, and CSV export of filtered view (`SLD-FE-420`, `SLD-BE-420`).
- Local fallback contract now matches backend admin and collaborator visibility semantics for My Slides and Template Library queries.
- Oliver flow renderer now guards zero-step flows to prevent runtime `step.kind` crashes when command flows have no prompts.
- Browser-history back navigation now respects unsaved-change guardrails in the slides workspace (`SLD-FE-142`).
- Build gate is now part of this verification pass (`next build`) in addition to lint/typecheck/test.
- Single-worker Playwright runs completed green and remain the robust verification gate for this pass.

## Story-Level Verification Added

- `US-SLD-010`: empty/paste/file preflight validation and recoverable error state.
- `US-SLD-011`: grouped warning UX + structured component result table.
- `US-SLD-012`: parse progress and cancel interaction states.
- `US-SLD-013`: fixture-driven import/export/re-import drift tolerance checks.
- `US-SLD-031..032`: save/autosave + My Slides/Template Library flows.
- `US-SLD-034..036`: draft recovery, conflict/revision handling, audit feed visibility, and end-to-end slide lifecycle regression coverage.
- `US-SLD-037`: unsaved-change confirmation guardrails across workspace and hub navigation.
- `US-SLD-038`: per-user draft recovery lifecycle, legacy key migration, and post-save recovery clearing.
- `US-SLD-039`: autosave retry queue with bounded backoff, reconnect acceleration, and manual retry/dismiss controls.
- `US-SLD-020`: scaled 16:9 canvas renderer from component JSON with baseline inline layer editing.
- `US-SLD-021`: single-select + multi-select movement, bounded drag behavior, keyboard nudge controls, and resize handle guardrails.
- `US-SLD-022`: inline edit mode with enter/escape/blur lifecycle, synchronized style toolbar controls, and minimum 14px font-size enforcement.
- `US-SLD-023`: shift multi-select toggles, group nudge movement, alignment commands, and distribution validation messaging.
- `US-SLD-024`: undo/redo stack coverage for move/resize/text/style edits with both button and keyboard shortcut controls.
- `US-SLD-025`: semantic canvas roles, keyboard-first selection/edit flows, conflict-safe shortcut handling, and in-app shortcut reference panel.
- `US-SLD-026`: screenshot-diff visual baseline coverage for core canvas render, multi-select state, and style-toolbar-selected state.
- `US-SLD-027`: lock guardrails for inline editing, resize/move actions, and toolbar alignment/style/distribution operations.
- `US-SLD-028`: search-specific empty-state messaging for My Slides/templates/activity plus activity search filtering coverage.
- `US-SLD-029`: chatbot command parity for parse/save/export/navigation flows with collision-safe command discoverability.
- `US-SLD-040`: chatbot command path executes direct HTML export download with no dead-end follow-up.
- `SLD-FE-400`: publish workflow includes visibility control (private/shared) with non-admin UI restriction to private.
- `SLD-BE-400`: backend enforces template update/archive ownership ACL and admin-only shared visibility changes.
- `SLD-FE-410`: template cards expose owner context, owner/admin transfer controls, collaborator role management UI, and delegated template visibility for collaborator members.
- `SLD-BE-410`: backend transfer/collaborator actions validate owner/admin rights and verify target users have slides permission before governance updates.
- `SLD-FE-142`: browser-back route transitions now trigger unsaved-change protection before leaving the slides workspace.
- `SLD-FE-420`: activity tab supports actionable filters, pagination controls, and CSV export for the current query view.
- `SLD-BE-420`: `/api/slides?resource=audits` supports server-side search/filter/date-range pagination contract with bounded page size.

## Evidence Anchors

- Slides page + state machine: `src/app/slides/page.tsx`
- Import helpers: `src/components/slides/import-validation.ts`, `src/components/slides/html-import.ts`
- Export helper: `src/components/slides/html-export.ts`
- FE/BE contracts: `src/components/slides/persistence-types.ts`, `src/lib/slides.ts`, `functions/api/slides.js`
- Migrations: `supabase/migrations/003_slides_platform.sql`, `supabase/migrations/005_slide_audit_filter_indexes.sql`, `supabase/migrations/006_slide_template_collaborators.sql`
- Tests: `tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts`, `tests/e2e/frontend-smoke.spec.ts`, `tests/fixtures/slides/*.html`
- Visual baselines: `tests/e2e/slides-visual.spec.ts`, `tests/e2e/slides-visual.spec.ts-snapshots/*.png`

## Remaining Gaps

- Approval workflows remain pending under `SLD-FE-410`/`SLD-BE-410`.
- Native PPTX export and async job orchestration remain pending under `SLD-FE-500`/`SLD-BE-500`/`SLD-BE-510`.
